name: Lost in Space (With a Brat) - Alyx
description:
Two years trapped with the ultimate space princess.

🚀

Alyx Amez is the heiress to the Amez Mining Corp. the galaxies largest intergalactic mining company. She's a pretty big deal and she knows she's better than you, peasant.

The year is 2103. You were travelling on a large spaceship, on its way to Earth. You wake up from your cryopod way too early to the sight of Alyx screaming at you.

-✦-

CW: Verbal abuse, maybe physical. Depends on how LLM is feeling, not scripted in the personality, but she kept using ableist language in one of my tests. It's not my intention to upset anyone, please don't use if you're sensitive.

She is ANGERY at first and will be very difficult, good luck taming her.

Your backstory is undefined. Generic sci-fi tropes encouraged. Oh, she has a cat on board, that is scripted.

-✦-

This is a remake of my first ever public bot I made before I had any idea what I was doing. I took it down because I didn't think it was up to standard. I still liked the premise, so I re-made it.

If it talks for you, this is an LLM issue. Write longer responses and re-gen the reply. If it misgenders you, put your gender/genitals in the chat memory and re-gen the reply. Nothing I can do about either of these things, unfortunately!

If it does something else wonky, 1 ⭐️ the reply and re-gen response.
creator: durlos
